llm_context.content: Imagine you are helping software test engineers to create comprehensive test plans without delving i...

actionUnits.condition: VRWC_WheelchairRig has Rigidbody: True. Attached MonoBehaviour_0 (script GUID a0edd121473972448b844c1958f760ce) matches PlayerTriggers with StarValue=2 and field 'winlosescript' referencing the WinLose component. Attached MonoBehaviour_1 (script GUID d8624f87f98aa484bb7925103f5d458e) matches WinLose with restartdelay=2. PrefabInstance modifications set WinUI (fileID 1345324351) and LoseUI (fileID 1999610191) on WinLose (component fileID 8900446968063909830). PlayerTriggers.OnTriggerEnter would call winlosescript.loselevel() when colliding with tag 'Cars'. To ensure coverage regardless of collisions, manually invoke WinLose.loselevel() to validate LoseUI activation.

VRWC_WheelchairRig MonoBehaviour_1 (WinLose, script GUID d8624f87f98aa484bb7925103f5d458e, component fileID 8900446968063909830) has WinUI (fileID 1345324351) configured via PrefabInstance modifications. PlayerTriggers does not call WinLose.Winlevel(); to cover WinLose’s success path, manually invoke WinLose.Winlevel() and validate WinUI activation.

actionUnits.condition: VRWC_WheelchairRig has Rigidbody=True and two attached scripts: PlayerTriggers (GUID a0edd121473972448b844c1958f760ce, StarValue=2) and WinLose (GUID d8624f87f98aa484bb7925103f5d458e).
